headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 19, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, while the Chicago Cubs took down the New York Mets 4-2.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including James McArthur, who has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation. The Philadelphia Phillies have placed Jhoan Duran on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain. Other injured players include Prelander Berroa, Cade Horton, Jorge Polanco, Patrick Wisdom, Zach McKinstry, and Josh Hader.

The Houston Astros have bolstered their roster with the acquisition of shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees. The Astros sent right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez to the Yankees in the trade. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made a move, trading right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, while the Arizona Diamondbacks sent right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren, who earned the win with 7.0 innings pitched, 11 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win after a strong relief appearance. Tony Santillan secured the save for the Reds.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs took down the New York Mets 4-2, with Jameson Taillon earning the win after 6.0 innings of work.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a hard-fought win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, outlasting their opponents 8-7. Cedric Mullins led the Rays' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Royals Roster Update: McArthur Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Kansas City Royals right-handed pitcher James McArthur has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees. The trade sent right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez to the Yankees.
